catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for SST_GLO_SST_L3S_NRT_OBSERVATIONS_010_010, detailing the specifications and usage of near real-time sea surface temperature observations over the global ocean.

product_line.name: Global Ocean Near Real Time Sea Surface Temperature Observations
